case_name: Naz Foundation v. Govt of NCT Delhi
held: Section 377 IPC read down to exclude consensual same-sex adult acts.

case_name: Arnab Goswami v. State of Maharashtra
held: Bail granted to journalist. Personal liberty under Article 21 cannot be sacrificed to satisfy popular sentiment.

case_name: Nupur Sharma v. Ashwini Kumar Upadhyay
held: Directions to Union to file response on petition seeking UCC. Court noted the Constitutional mandate under Article 44.
